sql.query: SELECT s.id,s.locationId,CONCAT(l.locationName,' / ',s.spaceName,CASE WHEN s.isActive=0 THEN ' (inactive)' ELSE '' END) AS spaceLabel FROM tbl_spaces s INNER JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=s.locationId AND l.tenantId=s.tenantId WHERE s.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY l.locationName,s.isActive DESC,s.sortOrder,s.spaceName
